# Source Note: ACCC 2026/27 Priorities

## Source

URL: https://www.accc.gov.au/about-us/news/speeches/acccs-compliance-and-enforcement-priorities-update-2026-27-address

## What it says

Digital manipulative/false practices and subscription traps are priorities.

## Why it matters for autonomous marketing agents

This source informs what the agent can automate, how it should structure work, or what platform constraints it must account for.
